case_title: NGO, KEVIN WIET VS KASS, STANISLAV et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-14-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NEED TO SERVE SECOND DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGO, KEVIN WIET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV LOUTSIOUK, OLESSIA $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,822.00, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2006, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED. SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO LOUTSIOUK, OLESSIA RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NOT IN THAT ADDRESS.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV HEARING SET FOR APR-13-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY NGO, KEVIN WIET AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV LOUTSIOUK, OLESSIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV
PROOF OF SERVICE FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF, AS TO KASS, STANISLAV
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-13-2006, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM APR-13-2006 TO JUN-05-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT SIGNED. FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF DEPT TOGETHER WITH DEFT'S DESCRIPTION AND $105 CHECK.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-25-2006 AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AS TO DEFENDANT KASS, STANISLAV
